title: Convert a domain event into an outbound DTO
scenario: Outbound adapters also need explicit boundaries. A domain event can become a transport DTO through an infallible From implementation.
instructions: Implement From<UserRegistered> for UserRegisteredDto. Convert user_id to String and move the email.

hints.body: Keep the Converting DTOs into domain commands code active and implement From<UserRegistered> for UserRegisteredDto. Convert user_id to String and move the email.
Use the Rust API named in this lesson instead of adding a side helper; the previous arc code should stay in the main solution.
One complete solution for Convert a domain event into an outbound DTO is shown below.

completionExplanation: Convert a domain event into an outbound DTO now extends the active Converting DTOs into domain commands code with from dto outbound. The previous lesson's behavior remains in the main solution rather than an archived module.
